title: AP Calculus Teacher — IDEA Weslaco Pike College Prep (2026-2027)
summary: Teach AP Calculus to college-bound students. Set ambitious achievement goals, deliver rigorous grade-level curriculum, track student data, and develop a strong classroom culture.
required_education: Bachelor's degree from an accredited four-year institution
required_credentials: State certification preferred (not strictly required); high mathematics content proficiency expected
responsibilities: Implement state learning standards and IDEA curricula / assessments.
Deliver AP Calculus content and grade-level objectives.
Submit weekly lesson plans; track student progress with assessments.
Communicate student progress with families weekly.
Maintain a clear, consistent behavior-management system.
